_instructions: To add a new case study: (1) add an object to `studies`, (2) drop photos into the theme `assets/` folder with a `cs-` prefix and register each filename in snippets/case-study-assets.liquid, (3) reference them in the `photos` array as `asset:filename.jpg`, (4) create a Shopify page with the same `slug` as its handle and assign template `page.case-study`. The first entry in `photos` becomes the hero AND the card cover; the rest render as a gallery with a click-to-zoom lightbox. The `hero_image` and `gallery` fields are still supported for back-compat.

studies.title: Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka 2026
studies.subtitle: A custom statue award for SumanTV Kannada's flagship recognition program
studies.tagline: When a TV network needs a trophy that looks as iconic as their brand mark — we make the brand the trophy.

photos.alt: Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka 2026 trophy — a gold sculpted 'S' wrapping a blue globe, topped with the SumanTV Kannada Chikkaballapur logo, mounted on a polished wood base with engraved gold nameplate.
photos.caption: The finished award, ready for the broadcast ceremony

studies.about_client: SumanTV Kannada is the Kannada-language arm of the SumanTV digital news network (parent: PlayEven Info Pvt Ltd, Hyderabad). The Chikkaballapur district unit produces local Karnataka news, civic stories and human-interest features for YouTube and OTT audiences. SumanTV's regional channels collectively reach millions of viewers across South India.
studies.about_event: The Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka Awards (ಸುಮನ ಸಾಧಕ — literally 'noble achiever') is SumanTV Kannada's flagship recognition program, honouring individuals whose perseverance, craft and public contribution have shifted the cultural needle in Karnataka. The 2026 edition's honourees include the India Women's Blind Cricket team captains — Deepika TC, Kavya V and Kavya NR — recognised for excellence on the international stage.
studies.design_brief: The client wanted a trophy that read as the brand at a glance. Most TV-award trophies bolt a logo plate onto a generic statue — we inverted that. The award itself is a sculpted, oversized 'S' (the channel's brand initial) sweeping around a richly enamelled globe, with the network's badge as the crown. Every angle reinforces the channel's identity; the engraved gold plaque on the wood plinth carries the event line.
production_notes: Sculpted 'S' form in cast metal with electroplated 24K gold-tone finish
Hand-painted enamel globe with metallic gold continents
Brushed-gold disc inlay carrying the SumanTV Kannada Chikkaballapur logo, mounted at the crown of the 'S'
Mirror-polished solid wood plinth with chamfered profile
Engraved brass nameplate in bordered serif type: 'KARNATAKA SUMANA SADHAKA 2026'
studies.outcome: Delivered on time for the awards ceremony. The trophy has become the visual anchor of SumanTV Kannada's award show coverage — featured in every broadcast cutaway, photo op and social post around the program.

studies.title: SOBHA Sales Toppers FY 2025-26
studies.subtitle: Twelve recognition trophies, three families, one annual sales kickoff and Magnus launch night
studies.tagline: Three trophy families. One annual recognition cycle. India's most-awarded developer trusts Meru.

photos.alt: SOBHA Q-wise Sales Topper trophy lineup — six gold-star + crystal-globe trophies on maroon columns and black plinths, plaques engraved with awardee names for Q1, Q3 and Q4 FY 2025-26.
photos.caption: Set A: Q1, Q3 and Q4 Sales Toppers across the Business Leader, STM and ACH tracks.

photos.alt: SOBHA Annual Sales Topper crystal pillars — three tall optical-grade crystal awards with diamond-cut, slant-cut and crystal-globe tops on black plinths.
photos.caption: Set B: Annual Sales Topper + 1st Runner-Up — the full-year leadership awards.

photos.alt: SOBHA Star of the Launch (Magnox) trophies — three red and gold star-and-crystal trophies on maroon backdrop, marking the Magnus pre-launch sales champions.
photos.caption: Set C: Star of the Launch — recognising the Magnus pre-launch sales champions.

studies.about_client: SOBHA Limited is one of India's largest fully backward-integrated real-estate developers. Headquartered in Bengaluru since 1995 and listed on NSE/BSE, the group owns the full delivery stack — interiors, glazing, MEP and concrete — and has collected 265+ industry awards including Times Real Estate Developer of the Year (Residential) and the Golden Peacock CSR Award in 2024–25.
studies.about_event: SOBHA's annual sales recognition for FY 2025-26 ran three concurrent tracks — Q-wise toppers, full-year toppers, and a dedicated launch-team recognition for the SOBHA Magnus ("Magnox") pre-launch campaign on Bannerghatta Road. Recurring top performers across roles included Chethan R D, Veena M K, Pranav C and Souganth B.
studies.design_brief: Three distinct silhouettes that still read as one set: a punchy gold-star recognition piece for quarterly toppers, a tall executive crystal pillar for annual winners, and a launch-themed red-and-gold star with maroon backdrop for the Magnus champions.
production_notes: Gold-plated zinc star with lightning cut-out on maroon acrylic column, crystal globe on stem
Optical-grade crystal pillar with diamond-cut, slant-cut and globe-top variants
Engraved brass-gold plaque with offset wordmark + awardee + period
Lacquered ply plinth with bevel detail and gold trim band
studies.outcome: All 12 trophies delivered in a single batch with consistent plaque typography across families — letting SOBHA stage a multi-category awards night without the family-to-family aesthetic break that usually happens with split vendors.

studies.title: RudderStack Hackathon 2026
studies.subtitle: Three-tier hackathon trophies — Winner, Runner Up and People's Choice — for a global data-infrastructure company
studies.tagline: One hackathon. Three tiers. A podium set that tells the whole story at a glance.

photos.alt: RudderStack Hackathon 2026 — three star trophies (gold Winner, silver Runner Up, bronze People's Choice) lined up side by side on a floor, RudderStack branding clearly visible on each plaque.
photos.caption: The full podium set: Winner, Runner Up and People's Choice for RudderStack Hackathon 2026

photos.alt: RudderStack Hackathon 2026 trophies — close-up of the plaques showing gold, silver and copper-tone finishes with RudderStack logo and event year engraved.
photos.caption: Plaque detail showing RudderStack branding and award tier on each trophy

studies.about_client: RudderStack is a leading customer data infrastructure (CDI) platform, founded in 2019 by Soumyadeb Mitra and headquartered in San Francisco, California. The platform collects, transforms, and routes event data from 200+ sources to every analytics, marketing, and data-warehouse tool in real time. RudderStack processed over 3.3 trillion events for 4,000+ organisations in 2025, and has approximately 127 employees across North America, Europe and Asia.
studies.about_event: RudderStack's internal Hackathon 2026 brought together engineering and product teams to build novel features and tools on top of their customer data platform. The three-prize structure — Winner (gold), Runner Up (silver) and a community-voted People's Choice (bronze) — reflects the collaborative spirit of the event, rewarding both technical excellence and peer-recognised innovation.
studies.design_brief: The brief called for a cohesive three-trophy podium set with clear tier differentiation. Each trophy uses the same human-figure-raising-a-star form — instantly readable as 'achievement' — but in distinct metallic finishes: 24K gold-tone for the winner, bright chrome silver for runner-up, and a warm rose-gold/bronze for the crowd favourite. The RudderStack logo and event year are printed on individual plaques on the black plinths.
production_notes: Cast-metal figure with outstretched arms raising a five-pointed star — available in gold, silver and bronze-tone electroplate
Red enamel star accent at the crown on all three trophies
Individually branded black plinth plaques printed with RudderStack logo, event name and award tier
Consistent height and silhouette across the set for a clean podium photo
studies.outcome: The three-piece set delivered a clear visual hierarchy for the awards presentation — gold, silver and bronze instantly communicate the ranking without any text. The RudderStack brand appeared prominently on every trophy, making the award set ideal for social media documentation of the hackathon results.

studies.title: Golden Jubilee Celebration — Central College Bangalore
studies.subtitle: A commemorative golden plaque for the 1974-76 M.A. Economics batch's 50-year reunion
studies.client: Central College, Bengaluru — 1974-76 M.A. Economics Batch
studies.event: Golden Jubilee Celebration — 1974-76 Batch M.A. Economics
studies.tagline: Fifty years of friendship, knowledge and Karnataka — commemorated in gold.

photos.alt: Central College Bangalore Golden Jubilee Celebration plaque — a tall gold-tone plaque on a dark wood base, featuring the iconic Central College clock tower in a circular medallion with laurel wreath, and the inscription '1974-76 Batch M.A. Economics — Central College, Bangalore'.
photos.caption: The commemorative plaque for the 1974-76 M.A. Economics batch, featuring the college's iconic clock tower

stats.label: Format
stats.value: Framed gold plaque on wood base

studies.about_client: Central College, Bengaluru (officially Government Central College) is one of the oldest and most prestigious institutions in Karnataka, established in 1858. The college served as the seat of Bangalore University until the Jnana Bharathi campus opened in 1973. Its iconic Victorian clock tower is one of Bengaluru's most recognised architectural landmarks. The M.A. Economics department has produced generations of economists, administrators and policy makers across India.
studies.about_event: The Golden Jubilee Celebration marks the 50th anniversary of the 1974-76 M.A. Economics batch completing their postgraduate studies at Central College, Bengaluru. Alumni reunions of this nature bring together batchmates — often spread across India and the world — to celebrate five decades of shared memories, academic journeys and enduring friendships. A commemorative plaque serves as a lasting keepsake of the milestone gathering.
studies.design_brief: The client wanted a plaque that captured the gravitas of 50 years and the heritage of the institution. The circular medallion at the top features a colour photograph of Central College's iconic clock tower, framed by a cast gold laurel wreath — a traditional symbol of achievement and longevity. The lower panel carries the event inscription in elegant serif type on a gold background, mounted on a deep mahogany-finish wood base.
production_notes: Tall rectangular gold-tone metal plate with border and recessed inscription panel
Circular colour-print medallion of Central College clock tower, mounted at crown with cast laurel wreath surround
Engraved/printed inscription: 'GOLDEN JUBILEE CELEBRATION · 1974-76 BATCH · M.A. ECONOMICS · CENTRAL COLLEGE, BANGALORE'
Deep mahogany-finish solid wood base with bevelled profile
studies.outcome: A meaningful keepsake for an alumni batch celebrating a major milestone. The plaque design anchors the institution's heritage (the clock tower medallion) with the personal significance of the event — making it both a display piece and a conversation starter at the reunion.

studies.title: Equitas Small Finance Bank — Super Star Contest
studies.subtitle: An individual performance recognition shield for Spandana R Rao, April 2026 Super Star Contest winner
studies.tagline: Recognising the top performer who outpaced every target in April.

photos.alt: Equitas Small Finance Bank Super Star Contest April 2026 award — a bronze-finish shield trophy with star accents, the Equitas 'e' logo medallion at the crown, and a gold engraved plaque reading 'Congratulations — For Achieving Super Star Contest in April - 2026 — Spandana R Rao'.
photos.caption: The Super Star Contest shield for Spandana R Rao — Equitas Small Finance Bank, April 2026

studies.about_client: Equitas Small Finance Bank Limited is a Reserve Bank of India-licensed small finance bank headquartered in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It serves micro and small enterprises, low-income households and underbanked segments across India. The bank is listed on NSE and BSE and is known for its strong sales culture, branch network across South India, and regular employee recognition programs that include monthly and quarterly performance contests.
studies.about_event: The Equitas Super Star Contest is a monthly sales performance recognition program, rewarding branch staff who achieve the highest targets in loan disbursals, deposit mobilisation and new account acquisition. The April 2026 Super Star — Spandana R Rao — earned the award by outperforming all peers in her region for the month, receiving this personalised shield at a branch awards ceremony.
studies.design_brief: Equitas wanted a premium yet personal shield that an individual would be proud to display at their desk. The shield shape — a classic heraldic form — conveys honour and achievement. The Equitas 'e' logo is rendered as a die-cast medallion at the crown, set against a rope-pattern disc. Star burst accents around the bottom anchor the design, and the central gold plaque carries the personalised congratulatory inscription with the recipient's name in bold.
production_notes: Shield-shaped base in dark resin with bronze-tone metallic finish
Five-pointed star accents at corners and base, matching bronze tone
Die-cast 'e' logo medallion at crown on a rope-pattern disc surround with red/blue enamel accents
Central gold engraved plaque: 'equitas · Congratulations · For Achieving Super Star Contest in April - 2026 · Spandana R Rao'
Lacquered black base with logo-engraved nameplate
studies.outcome: A personalised award that the recipient can display with pride. The shield format — larger and more visually distinctive than a standard plaque — makes the recognition feel significant and tangible. Equitas uses Meru for individual performance awards across its branch network.

studies.title: UDAAN DSM & FSO Excellence Awards — April 2026
studies.subtitle: Custom eagle trophies for insurance field sales champions across Tamil Nadu
studies.tagline: Eagle trophies for the field champions of a Tamil Nadu insurance sales blitz.

photos.alt: UDAAN DSM & FSO Excellence Award — eagle trophy with engraved plaque, Tamil Nadu April 2026
photos.caption: UDAAN eagle award for April 2026 DSM & FSO Excellence.

studies.about_client: UDAAN is a high-performance sales incentive programme run by an insurance company in Tamil Nadu, recognising top District Sales Managers (DSM) and Field Sales Officers (FSO) for outstanding performance.
studies.about_event: The April 2026 UDAAN Excellence Awards celebrated the best field sales performers across Tamil Nadu's insurance distribution network. Eagle trophies were presented to DSM and FSO category winners.
studies.design_brief: Die-cast eagle on a solid plinth with gold-finish engraved nameplate. The eagle motif reflects the programme's aspirational 'UDAAN' (flight) theme.
production_notes: Die-cast eagle trophy with gold finish
Engraved plaque with awardee name, role, region and month
Solid plinth base
studies.outcome: Custom eagle trophies delivered for the UDAAN April 2026 DSM and FSO Excellence Awards, Tamil Nadu.

studies.title: Bangalore SAWTA — Guru Kunami 2026
studies.subtitle: Mementos for a Santali cultural celebration honouring Padmashree Dr. Damayanti Besra
studies.tagline: Honouring tradition and Padmashree excellence at a Santali Guru Kunami in Bengaluru.

photos.alt: Bangalore SAWTA Guru Kunami 2026 memento trophy with engraved plaque for Padmashree Dr. Damayanti Besra
photos.caption: Memento presented at Bangalore SAWTA Guru Kunami 2026.

studies.about_client: Bangalore SAWTA is a Santali cultural organisation based in Bengaluru, dedicated to preserving and promoting Santali tribal arts, music and dance traditions among the Santali diaspora in Karnataka.
studies.about_event: Guru Kunami — the Santali equivalent of Guru Purnima — was celebrated on 10 May 2026. The event hosted Padmashree Dr. Damayanti Besra (renowned Santali classical dancer and former principal, Odisha) as Chief Guest and Mr. Rajendra Saren as Guest of Honour.
studies.design_brief: Understated memento trophy / plaque engraved with the event name, date and guest designation — befitting a cultural felicitation ceremony.
production_notes: Engraved memento plaque with event title and guest name
Cultural motif finish appropriate for a tribal arts celebration
studies.outcome: Mementos crafted and delivered for the Guru Kunami 2026 ceremony of Bangalore SAWTA.

studies.title: SBI Life Insurance — Annual L&D Meet 2025-26
studies.subtitle: Recognition trophies for the Eklavya Review's top learning and development achievers
studies.tagline: Recognising the self-driven learners powering SBI Life's national sales network.

photos.alt: SBI Life Insurance Annual L&D Meet 2025-26 Eklavya Review recognition trophy with engraved plaque
photos.caption: Eklavya Review recognition trophy — SBI Life L&D Meet 2025-26.

studies.about_client: SBI Life Insurance is one of India's largest private life insurance companies, a joint venture between State Bank of India and BNP Paribas Cardif. Its L&D function runs the flagship Eklavya programme — a self-directed learning initiative for its national field sales force.
studies.about_event: The Annual L&D Meet 2025-26 brought together SBI Life's learning and development leaders to review the year's Eklavya programme outcomes. Recognition trophies were awarded to outstanding individual achievers (Rajeev Sharma, Delhi) and best Area L&D Manager with Team (Soni Amit, Ahmedabad).
studies.design_brief: Professional recognition trophies engraved with the Eklavya Review branding, awardee name, role and region — suitable for an internal national HR/L&D ceremony.
production_notes: Recognition trophy with gold finish
Engraved plaque with Eklavya Review branding, awardee name and region
studies.outcome: Recognition trophies delivered for SBI Life Insurance's Annual L&D Meet 2025-26 Eklavya Review — individual and team categories.

studies.title: The Oxford College of Law — Target 60, Phase I
studies.subtitle: Academic excellence trophies for the Target 60 competition among B.A. LL.B. students
studies.client: The Oxford College of Law, Bangalore
studies.tagline: Trophies for the academic achievers of Karnataka's premier law school.

photos.alt: The Oxford College of Law Target 60 Phase I 2025-26 trophy with engraved plaque for 2nd Runner Up Srinath
photos.caption: Target 60 Phase I — 2nd Runner Up trophy, The Oxford College of Law, Bangalore.

studies.about_client: The Oxford College of Law, Bangalore is one of Karnataka's leading law schools, approved by the Bar Council of India and affiliated to Karnataka State Law University. Located in HSR Layout, the college offers B.A. LL.B., BBA LL.B. and LL.B. programmes.
studies.about_event: Target 60 is an internal academic challenge programme at Oxford College of Law. Phase I for the 2025-26 academic year recognised top-performing students. The 2nd Runner Up award went to Srinath from the B.A. LL.B. 8th Semester.
studies.design_brief: Clean academic trophy with engraved plaque citing the programme name, phase, position and student name — appropriate for a formal law school prize-giving.
production_notes: Academic recognition trophy
Engraved plaque: Target 60 Phase I, position, student name, semester
studies.outcome: Trophies delivered for The Oxford College of Law's Target 60 Phase I 2025-26 academic recognition programme.

studies.title: Achiever Cricket Academy — Achievement Award 2026
studies.subtitle: Custom cricket trophies celebrating emerging talent at Bangalore's Achiever Cricket Academy
studies.tagline: Celebrating the next generation of cricketers from Bengaluru.

photos.caption: Achievement trophy for Achiever Cricket Academy, Bengaluru, 2026.

studies.about_client: Achiever Cricket Academy is a Bengaluru-based cricket coaching academy dedicated to developing passionate cricketers of all ages and abilities. The academy offers professional coaching, fitness training, tournaments, and one-to-one mentoring.
studies.about_event: The 2026 Achievement Awards recognised top performers at Achiever Cricket Academy's seasonal programme — celebrating emerging talent in Bengaluru's youth cricket ecosystem.
studies.design_brief: Sports achievement trophy with cricket motif, engraved with academy name, year and awardee details.
production_notes: Cricket trophy with sport-themed design
Engraved plaque with academy name, award title and awardee
studies.outcome: Achievement trophies delivered for Achiever Cricket Academy's 2026 recognition programme in Bengaluru.

studies.title: Edappayil Family Meet 2K26
studies.subtitle: Personalised mementos for a cherished Kerala family reunion
studies.tagline: Timeless mementos for an exceptional Kerala family reunion.

photos.alt: Edappayil Family Meet 2K26 personalised memento trophy with engraved plaque
photos.caption: Family Meet 2K26 memento — presented for Exceptional Achievement.

studies.about_client: The Edappayil family is a Kerala joint family celebrating its annual reunion — a tradition of togetherness marked with personalised mementos for those who have excelled during the year.
studies.about_event: Family Meet 2K26 brought the Edappayil family together for their annual reunion. Custom engraved mementos were presented to members recognised for Exceptional Achievement during the year.
studies.design_brief: Warm, personalised memento trophy with 'Family Meet 2K26' and 'Presented for Exceptional Achievement' engraved — a keepsake that balances celebration with elegance.
production_notes: Personalised memento trophy / plaque
Engraved: Family Meet 2K26, Exceptional Achievement
Suitable for gifting at a family celebration
studies.outcome: Custom mementos crafted for the Edappayil Family Meet 2K26 — a heartfelt keepsake for a special Kerala family reunion.
